0: (Hope) [7a 8]We've become something more, something
better−−a new breed of humanity rebuilt
by God.
[->]We are celestial beings, part human
and part angel, now.
[->]Our differences with you Unclean Ones 
are irreconcilable. All who oppose 
Abbot Hugo must be eradicated!
[END]
1: (Hope) [7a 8]Ugh... How could a celestial being such
as myself lose to unawakened rabble like
you!?
[->]You said your name is [Flynn], yes?
[->]Heh... The Eastern Kingdom of Mikado
is now filled with celestial beings...
[->]It won't be long before the [Color:0x5]Demon Gene[Color:0x0]
infects everyone...
[->]If you want to stop this, you need
to find Abbot Hugo. He is in the
Monastery...
[END]
100: (Dagda) There are 20 turns left. Hurry, Kid.
[END]
101: (Dagda) C'mon, kid−−only 10 turns left.
[END]
102: (Dagda) 5 more turns... This is looking grim.
[END]
103: (Dagda) Damn. You failed, kid. It's too late, 
now.
[->]Everyone in the kingdom is now infected.
[Color:0x5]Including you[Color:0x0].
[END]
104: 〉 Dagda looks at you bitterly.
[->]〉 As he does, you notice what's 
happening to your body...
[END]
